title: Old Bedrock
description: Reverts the bedrock texture to the old, pre-1.14 texture.
body:
All this resourcepack does is to revert the bedrock texture to the old, pre-1.14 texture. Also useful for overriding the bedrock texture when using other resource packs that might make the bedrock look worse.


Click here or on the image above for the New version **You might also want to use:** |[![Old Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1994e448bfaa2fdd6151914c7399c544542656.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-water)|[![Mute Pistons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aeec93b0bdb43d8d4633fd32d1367a906006c67.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-pistons)|[![Quieter Pistons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1164bd3922a7fca0f83fc50bae850740e7b226c9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-pistons)|[![Mute Dispensers and Droppers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfef63948d14ccf83da7ece681a70d2ff838343.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-dispensers-and-droppers)|[![Quieter Dispensers and Droppers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ceac66ed47273378ac263a432d4254938080b2b.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-dispensers-and-droppers)|[![Vanilla Hearts HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bb8f272918f8777c6af0bfe70ad575be6f0fa6.gif)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hearts)|[![Vanilla Hunger HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1336a6f717600e59b291fbbe5d48c67715e6a61f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hunger) |:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:| |[Old Water](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-water)|[Mute Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-pistons)|[Quieter Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-pistons)|[Mute Dispensers and Droppers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-dispensers-and-droppers)|[Quieter Dispensers and Droppers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-dispensers-and-droppers)|[Vanilla Hearts HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hearts)|[Vanilla Hunger HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hunger)
